commit_scope: Executable trusted physical/organism mesh cells plus registry drift repair. Adds Form-native mesh seed, organism stewardship, concrete hardware/software design rows, cell-organ substrate layering, node exchange, and a parallel life-mesh gate; closes blueprint drift for VALUE-NONE and FSH-SCRIPT/fsh-bp; closes primitive registry drift for str_byte_at, form_compile, and form_walk.
